Description/Notes: Upgraded successor to the retired Phase 20 Frozen Command Center; frosted glass-and-steel ops look with grid floor, aurora band, scan-line readouts, and frost-cyan accents on the unchanged Lunar Signal Deck layout.

Parameterized reusable template that spawns a polished theme for any country via placeholders (flag palette, emblem, ambient motif, sounds); adding a country is a data-only change. More elaborate successor to the country-flag accent.

Reusable time-boxed template for holidays/events (Halloween, Winter, New Year, Lunar New Year, Valentine's, Pride, milestones) with palette/ornament/ambient placeholders and an active date window for auto enable/disable.
Deep-space navigation lab: parallax star field, slow-rotating constellation graticule, violet nebula bloom, astral-violet and star-gold accents; cinematic and calm.
Warm organic forest canopy: dappled light, drifting motes, leaf-green and bark-amber accents, woody sounds; emerald correct tiles kept distinct from the green palette.
1980s arcade cabinet on a curved CRT: scan lines, phosphor bloom, curvature vignette, marquee glow, magenta/cyan accents, chiptune sounds; legibility preserved.
Rain-slicked neon megacity: data-rain, magenta/cyan sign-glow blooms, wet-street reflection, glitch tile flip, synthwave sounds; neon kept on accents only so tile states still dominate.
Candle-lit wizard's library: warm candlelight bloom, floating runes, dust motes, parchment grain, amethyst/gold accents, mystical sounds; cozy and ancient.
